test.note: All 1096 tests passed; exit code 134 is post-test Node.js runtime crash unrelated to test failures

nonBlockingIssues.description: eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps comment suppresses ESLint warning for handleClose dependency. Could be improved by using useCallback for handleClose outside the component.
250ms setTimeout magic number for close animation should be extracted to a constant for maintainability.
slideInLeft animation referenced but not defined in global.css keyframes. Falls back silently but animation may not play as expected.

appliedUpdates.description: Added mobile design-system patterns section to architecture.md: dual-render pattern for mobile overlays and safe-area-inset convention for iOS compatibility

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Consider adding guidance about animation keyframe naming convention. Current codebase has both prefixed (o-shake, o-glass-in) and unprefixed (fadeOut, sheetSlideUp) animation names.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: global.css shows inconsistent naming: existing animations use o- prefix (o-check-draw, o-shake, o-glass-in) while new mobile animations use unprefixed names (fadeOut, slideDown, sheetSlideUp, sheetSlideDown).
